prompt_replacements.old: When a time input constrains an answer_request, assign it one POPULATION_TESTS use_id and reference that use_id from the applicable EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT.
prompt_replacements.new: When a time input constrains an answer_request, list the applicable EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT test_id on its POPULATION_TESTS use.

prompt_replacements.old: Within each answer_request, author answer_expression, then question_input_uses, then answer_subject, answer_population, and answer_outputs.
prompt_replacements.new: Within each answer_request, author answer_expression, then answer_subject and answer_population, then question_input_uses, and then answer_outputs.

prompt_replacements.old: Create exactly one question_input_uses record for each fact-local input_ref. When several population tests consume that input, they reuse its one use_id; do not create one use record per test.
prompt_replacements.new: Create exactly one question_input_uses record for each fact-local input_ref.

prompt_replacements.old: Use POPULATION_TESTS when the input is an operand of one or more EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT membership tests, and give that use a unique use_id.
prompt_replacements.new: Give each EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT a unique test_id. Use POPULATION_TESTS when the input is an operand of one or more such tests, and list those test IDs in membership_test_ids.

prompt_replacements.old:
Each EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT lists the use_id of every POPULATION_TESTS operand it consumes in question_input_use_refs.
One population test may reference several POPULATION_TESTS uses, and one POPULATION_TESTS use may be referenced by several tests.
Membership-test question_input_use_refs may name only POPULATION_TESTS uses. GROUP_KEY, COMPUTE_EXPRESSION, and RESULT_LIMIT inputs are never membership-test operands.
prompt_replacements.new: One POPULATION_TESTS use may list several membership_test_ids, and one membership test may be listed by several POPULATION_TESTS uses. GROUP_KEY, COMPUTE_EXPRESSION, and RESULT_LIMIT uses have no membership_test_ids.
